stemHtml:
What are the main parameters recorded on the FDR?

(i) time or relative time count
(ii) pitch and roll attitude
(iii) yaw attitude
(iv) airspeed
(v) pressure altitude
(vi) heading
(vii) normal acceleration
(viii) propulsive/thrust power on each engine
(ix) cockpit thrust/power lever position
(x) flaps/slats configuration or cockpit selection
(xi) ground spoilers and/or speed brake selection
